reviews.review_description: This game is amazing, or, was at the time of writing this. People still play it, but not enough. Xorwire has abandoned a plethora of projects, and this one is a sad one to see go. One thing I ask before the time of this game is up is just to do a bunch of little tweaks. No map extensions, new monsters, ect, just a few bug fixes and quality of life updates. For example, fixing the unloading hands, or slow speed and attention rate of the monsters￼ would make this an S tier experience. There is potential but this game is just AN INCH away from GREATNESS.
everytime i join there is no players and im stuck invisible
This game has potential like it could be like breakout vr just keep working and it will pay off!
i remember when this game was on Itchio my friend told me to download this then it came to app lab and stopped working
There's no active players. I tried to join other servers and there was nobody else one star

I always join the game and since then, my game is now broken.. Everytime I join back I’m invisible and theres no more players to have fun with. I always try to rejoin and rejoin over and over but it still never works, please fix this Dev’s…

Here are some ideas for the future of this game:

shop with shop systems: add cosmetics or bundles, and in game currency that can be collectable by finding them around the map or purchased with real money

monster ai: in the update board it said the monsters are no longer unmotivated to run, but the only issue now is that they are way too slow, can you pls fix it?

grabbables: add simple little gadgets around the map that can be picked up using your controllers, such as monster trackers or other things

random things: add more cameras (mabye add some in the burrow?) add more camera monitors around the map, add closing/opening gates that can be used by players | make it so you can grab bubs for some reason | add back the system where if you die, there is a blood effect and mabye add dead body ragdolls. | make it so u can move your fingers

bug fixes: fix the hand hitboxes, they are uneven and are hard to move with em

add more maps: mabye add maps you can teleport to such as a forest map, backrooms, or more

misc: add more monsters | extend the map | private lobbies? | game and monster lore

reviews.review_title: I recommend you download this, it’s fun
reviews.review_description: I haven’t played it yet, I’ll update my review when I do. (Also first review :D) update: I played it and recorded some stuff, and it’s pretty fun (no this isn’t a bot review)
